creator: mike@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, Jul 21, 2001 at 12:00:09PM -0400, RVick wrote:
> I don't know. I was pretty disgusted when I could not
> get anywhere with FreeBSD and the Tecra 8000. I
> stopped trying FreeBSD and I stopped recommending
> or specifying Toshiba Laptops. (Non standard
> cost reduction to keyboard interface)
> 
> If you have no one else to try, I could download
> and attempt another install.

There have been a lot of changes since 3.2-RELEASE, so it has
a good chance of working.  It's doubtful anyone else would step
forward and test this.

Best regards,
Mike Barcroft
